hyperedges.relation: All four systems evaluated head-to-head in QA benchmark on HotpotQA dataset
Three Cognee retriever configurations benchmarked with CoT showing best performance
Four evaluation metrics used across 45 cycles with EM/F1 measuring traditional QA and DeepEval/Human-like measuring correctness

hyperedges.relation: All four systems evaluated head-to-head in QA benchmark on HotpotQA dataset
Three Cognee retriever configurations benchmarked with CoT showing best performance
Four evaluation metrics used across 45 cycles with EM/F1 measuring traditional QA and DeepEval/Human-like measuring correctness
